ddls:
CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* EC number of the substance */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the substance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the substance (e.g., identified SVHC) */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the substance */,
  "molecular_weight" TEXT /* Molecular weight of the substance */,
  "classification_type" TEXT /* Classification type of the substance (e.g., hazardous) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the substance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being submitted */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country making the submission */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization making the submission */,
  "expected_date_of_submission" TEXT /* Expected date of submission */,
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scope of the submission */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "submission_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_scope_id FOREIGN KEY ("scope_id") REFERENCES scopes ("scope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country (e.g., ISO 3166) */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., Europe, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., government, private) */,
  "organization_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scopes" (
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scope */,
  "scope_name" TEXT /* Name of the scope */,
  "scope_description" TEXT /* Description of the scope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endorsements" (
  "endorsement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endorsement */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being endorsed */,
  "endorsement_date" TEXT /* Date of the endorsement */,
  "endorsement_type" TEXT /* Type of endorsement (e.g., SVHC) */,
  "endorsement_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the endorsement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endorsement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endorsements_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identifications" (
  "identification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identification */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being identified */,
  "identification_date" TEXT /* Date of the identification */,
  "identification_type" TEXT /* Type of identification (e.g., SVHC) */,
  "identification_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identifications_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being classified */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date of the classification */,
  "classification_type" TEXT /* Type of classification (e.g., hazardous) */,
  "classification_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "property_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property (e.g., g/mol, °C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uses" (
  "use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance */,
  "use_name" TEXT /* Name of the use */,
  "use_description" TEXT /* Description of the use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uses_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, researcher) */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., SVHC, hazardous) */,
  "report_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date of the download */,
  "download_format" TEXT /* Format of the download (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazards" (
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazard */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance */,
  "hazard_name" TEXT /* Name of the hazard */,
  "hazard_description" TEXT /* Description of the hazard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazards_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exemptions" (
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exemption */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance */,
  "exemption_type" TEXT /* Type of exemption (e.g., research, medical) */,
  "exemption_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exemptions_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)
